businesses.license_type: Class B Locksmith Company (TX DPS PSB)

signals.evidence: Donald Cooper owner; ALOA certified since 1985 (his individual cert — implies he was old enough to obtain ALOA cert in 1985, today ~62-72). Business founded 1994 (32-yr operating tenure). Family-owned husband-wife (B. Cooper email = wife/family). license_tenure_proxy + aloa_cert_year inference.

32-yr business. MARITIME / PORT specialty (TWIC-ready — Transportation Worker Identification Credential for port + vessel access). Niche moat in TX Gulf Coast / Galveston port industrial corridor. Multi-service: residential + commercial + auto + safes. ALOA certified since 1985 (Donald Cooper). License #B13033. Family-owned + operated.

Live About page fetched 2026-05-15. Family-owned husband-wife (Donald + B. Cooper) — no second-gen Cooper named on page; no GM / VP / co-principal beyond the spouse. Live About is thin (mostly marketing language) — confidence capped. Husband-wife coast pattern.

businesses.layer1_comment: Donald Cooper, ~62-72, ALOA-certified since 1985 + owner-founder of Anytime Lock & Safe (Galveston Co) since 1994. Family-owned husband-wife. license_tenure_proxy + aloa_cert_year inference. Confidence: medium pending CAD GalvestonCAD OV65 + voter file.
businesses.layer2_comment: 32-yr maritime / port specialty business (TWIC-ready for ports + vessels). Niche moat in TX Gulf Coast — limited credentialed competitors. Multi-service depth. ALOA + family-owned + La Marque (Galveston Co Houston SE port adjacency). License #B13033. Plausible $700K-$1.5M rev band on maritime-niche premium + 4-staff inference. SBA-financeable.
businesses.layer3_comment: Strong coasting profile: husband-wife founder team (Donald + B. Cooper) at 32-yr tenure + no second-gen Cooper named on team + no successor structure exposed. Specialty / niche moat preserved but operating posture is classic coasting-couple. 3 tells.
businesses.layer4_comment: Galveston Co / La Marque Houston SE port industrial corridor (+2 industrial + +1 maritime-niche). LOW-PE-attention locksmith baseline (~65 + 2 quiet-rollup). Maritime-port niche broadens buyer pool to industrial-services strategics.
businesses.final_comment: Donald Cooper, ~62-72, ALOA-certified since 1985 + owner of Anytime Lock & Safe in La Marque (Galveston Co Houston SE port industrial corridor) since 1994 with wife B. Cooper. 32-yr husband-wife founder team. UNIQUE MARITIME / TWIC-ready port specialty = niche moat with limited TX Gulf Coast competitors. Multi-service depth. License #B13033 active. No second-gen Cooper named on team — classic coasting-couple profile. NOTE: just under A-tier final-score gate (73 < 78). With CAD GalvestonCAD OV65 + voter DOB confirmation, becomes a clean A-tier upgrade candidate. Strong B for now; flag for re-score with CAD + Comptroller passes.
businesses.value_add_thesis: Maritime-port locksmith niche with TWIC credential and 32-yr Gulf Coast tenure is a defensible book that PE / strategic-security-services hasn't organized around. Modernization levers: customer portal for port + vessel clients (no online service-history visible) + RMR-monitoring upsell + ServiceTitan migration + structured Cooper-exit handoff. Estimated EBITDA arbitrage 15% → 23% over 18-24 mo. ETA-friendly niche acquisition.
